version_description: The chords I've written out sound best on capo 6, but you can definitely transpose them to get a lower or a higher sound. Keep in mind I found these chords out by ear.

versions.version_description: Capo'ed for open chords that ring out (matches sustained keyboard), well suited to acoustic covers, two different strumming variations defined.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
The entire song seems to repeat the Cm-Bb/D-G-Cm chord progression.
The third chord on the third line of the chorus sounds a bit like a higher G but you can play G/B instead.


CHORDS (Relative to capo 6)

[tab]    [ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]Bb/D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]
e|---3---1---3---3---|
B|---4---3---3---0---|
G|---5---3---0---0---|
D|---5---0---0---0---|
A|---3-------2---2---|
E|-----------3-------|[/tab]



[Intro]

[ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]Bb/D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cm[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]      [ch]Bb/D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
I had a dream[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cm[/ch]
I got everything I wanted[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]             [ch]Bb/D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Not what you'd think[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Cm[/ch]
And if I'm bein' honest[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
Itmight've been a nightmare[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
Toanyone who might care[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]               [ch]Bb/D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Thought I couldfly (Fly)[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Cm[/ch]
So I stepped off the Golden, mm[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]     [ch]Bb/D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Nobody cried (Cried)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cm[/ch]
Nobody even noticed[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
I saw them standing right there[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Cm[/ch]
Kinda thought they might care (Might care)[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]      [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
I had a dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Cm[/ch]
I got everything I wanted[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]              [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
But when I wake up I see[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]
You with me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Cm[/ch]               [ch]Bb/D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Cm[/ch]
And you say, "As long as I'm here, no one can hurt you"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]          [ch]Bb/D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Cm[/ch]
Don't wanna lie here, but you can learn to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]          [ch]Bb/D[/ch]       [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]Cm[/ch]
If I could change the way that you see yourself[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                 [ch]Bb/D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Cm[/ch]
You wouldn't wonder why; here, they don't deserve you[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]         [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
I tried to scream[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Cm[/ch]
But my head was underwater[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]             [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
They called me weak[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]Cm[/ch]
Like I'm not just somebody's daughter[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cm[/ch]         [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
Coulda been a nightmare[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Cm[/ch]
But it felt like they were right there[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cm[/ch]                  [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
And it feels like yesterday was a year ago[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]Cm[/ch]
But I don't wanna let anybody know[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cm[/ch]              [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
'Cause everybody wants something from me now[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Cm[/ch]
And I don't wanna let 'em down[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]      [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
I had a dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Cm[/ch]
I got everything I wanted[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]              [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
But when I wake up I see[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]
You with me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Cm[/ch]               [ch]Bb/D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Cm[/ch]
And you say, "As long as I'm here, no one can hurt you"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]          [ch]Bb/D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Cm[/ch]
Don't wanna lie here, but you can learn to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]          [ch]Bb/D[/ch]       [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]Cm[/ch]
If I could change the way that you see yourself[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                 [ch]Bb/D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Cm[/ch]
You wouldn't wonder why; here, they don't deserve you[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                [ch]Bb/D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
If I knew it all then, would I do it again?[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cm[/ch]
Would I do it again?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Bb/D[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
If they knew what they said would go straight to my head[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Cm[/ch]
What would they say instead?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]               [ch]Bb/D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
If I knew it all then, would I do it again?[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cm[/ch]
Would I do it again?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                     [ch]Bb/D[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
If they knew what they said would go straight to my head[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Cm[/ch]
What would they say instead?[/tab]


[Outro]

[ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]Bb/D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cm[/ch]
